item.title: About me
item.description: 日本語ページ Profile Satoshi Tanaka Ishikawa Senoo Lab M2, Department of Creative Informatics, Graduate School of Information Science and Technology, The University of Tokyo Research Field / Interest Robotics, Computer Vision System integration of high-speed robot using 1000fps high-speed image processing Deformation Control, robot control for dynamic manipulation Application of high-speed image processing for logistics, Unmanned Aerial Vehicle(UAV) Biography Academic background 2014⁄04-2018⁄03 Dept. of Precison Engineering,

item.title: blog開設
item.description: 自分の自己紹介用のwebサイト兼blog開設しました． まだ工事中感が否めませんが，まぁ人様に公開できるレベルになったので公開します． このbl
